news.t: DoubleLine Mortgage ETF Management Fee Lowered to 39 Basis Points from 49 BPS
DoubleLine Launches New Exchange-Traded Funds DMBS and DCMB

overview.description: The DoubleLine Mortgage ETF (DMBS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of investment grade residential mortgage-backed securities of any maturity. The fund seeks to outperform the Bloomberg US Mortgage-Backed Securities Index DMBS was launched on Mar 31, 2023 and is issued by DoubleLine.
